headline: Viking Gets New CEO, Amid Growing Cruise Demand. The Stock Sails Higher.

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on Royal Caribbean Cruises Stock?
summary: While Royal Caribbean Cruises' has lagged behind the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
